name: TradeZella
tagline: The trading journal traders are actually choosing in 2026.
description: TradeZella is the modern trading journal that took the title from Tradervue. Auto-imports trades from 30+ brokers, tags by setup, surfaces your real edge with playbook analytics, and ships fast — new features land monthly. The cleanest UX in the journal space.
features: Auto-import from 30+ brokers (IBKR, TastyTrade, Robinhood, Webull, etc.)
Setup-based playbook analytics (find your edge per strategy)
Risk metrics: drawdown, win rate by setup, R-multiple distribution
Replay tool — chart your trades on the original setup
pros: Modern, fast UI — feels like a 2026 product
Playbook analytics genuinely surface your edge
Active development — new features ship monthly
Mobile app actually works for journal review on the go
cons: Mid-tier pricing — Tradervue's free plan is more generous for casual traders
Steeper learning curve than Tradervue if you just want simple P&L tracking
Some advanced filters require the higher Premium tier
useCases: Traders who want to find their winning setup via data
Anyone tired of Tradervue's dated UI and slow development
verdict: If you're starting fresh in 2026, TradeZella is the obvious pick. The UI is years ahead of Tradervue, broker integrations are broader, and playbook analytics genuinely change how you review trades. Worth $29/mo if you trade actively.
